# LlamaIndex Bonus Assignment 1 - Requirements
# Python 3.11

# LlamaIndex Core Framework
llama-index
llama-index-agent-openai
llama-index-tools-code-interpreter
llama-index-embeddings-openai

# Frontend
streamlit

# Data Processing
polars
pandas

# Database
psycopg2-binary
sqlalchemy

# Vector Database
chromadb
llama-index-vector-stores-chroma

# Visualization (generated by LLM)
plotly

# LLM/Embeddings
openai

# Utilities
python-dotenv
